discussions.title: Best roses for humid climates?
discussions.author: Maya Torres
discussions.excerpt: I'm setting up a rose garden in Florida and struggling with mildew. Any recommendations for heat-tolerant, disease-resistant varieties?

discussions.title: How do I price wedding arrangements?
discussions.author: James Bloom
discussions.excerpt: Just starting my floristry business and a bride asked for a quote on centerpieces. How do you calculate pricing for weddings?

discussions.title: Silk flowers for outdoor events — yay or nay?
discussions.author: Priya Nair
discussions.excerpt: Client wants an all-silk arrangement for an outdoor garden wedding. Concerned about UV fading and wind damage. Thoughts?

discussions.title: Where to buy bulk peonies in season?
discussions.author: Liam Frost
discussions.excerpt: Looking for wholesale peony suppliers for spring. Open to local farms or online distributors with good shipping practices.

discussions.title: Composting flower waste — best practices
discussions.author: Amara Singh
discussions.excerpt: Running a small flower farm and want to compost all our green waste. Anyone have a system that works well for high-volume composting?

successStories.title: From Hobby to Full-Time Florist
successStories.author: Sarah Chen
successStories.story: Started selling arrangements at a local farmers market. Within two years, I opened my own shop and now employ three part-time assistants. The community here gave me the confidence to take the leap.

successStories.title: Won 'Best Garden Design' at City Show
successStories.author: Emma Laurent
successStories.story: Applied the companion planting techniques I learned from this community and won first place at the Austin Garden Show. Thank you to everyone who shared their tips!

successStories.title: Grew 500 Tulips for Charity Event
successStories.author: Iris Nakamura
successStories.story: Organized a neighborhood tulip-growing project and donated all 500 blooms to local nursing homes. The planning advice from this community was invaluable.

challenges.name: Spring Centerpiece Challenge
challenges.description: Create your best spring-themed centerpiece using at least three seasonal flowers. Share your process and final arrangement.

challenges.name: Best Rose Photo
challenges.description: Capture the most stunning rose photograph. Any variety, any setting. Judged on composition, lighting, and creativity.

challenges.name: 30-Day Flower Journal
challenges.description: Document your garden or flower care routine for 30 consecutive days. Share weekly updates and a final recap.
